headline: The Chinese box office isn't the Hollywood kingmaker it used to be. Here's why
summary: Shifting government content controls and postpandemic Hollywood trends have made China less of a player in the global box office landscape.

headline: Scotiabank Lowers Comcast (CMCSA) Target on Softer EBITDA Outlook
summary: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) is included among the 15 Cheapest Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 1, Scotiabank lowered its price recommendation on Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) to $34 from $35.25. It reiterated a Sector Perform rating on the shares. The firm said the US wireless pricing environment remains “competitive yet rational” and supportive of growth. The […]
